description: Unsafe type casting (client.zrange as any) bypasses TypeScript type safety on cache operations. Silent failures possible on sorted set range queries.
impact: Replace with proper type cast using Upstash SDK generics. Prevents silent cache failures.

description: Zero unit test coverage on core enrich() function. Central flight enrichment logic (program attachment, price calculation) completely untested. Edge cases (0 passengers, undefined returnFlight, negative prices) unprotected.
impact: 1-2 weeks to add comprehensive test suite. Prevents silent bugs in flight data transformation.

description: F2 calendar API endpoint has zero test coverage. Month validation, cache hit/miss, Duffel/TP fallback, error handling all untested.
impact: Users may see incomplete or wrong 6-month heatmap data. Silent regressions in date handling.

description: F3 streaming search endpoint has zero tests. Error propagation, client disconnect, partial results, buffer management untested.
impact: Streaming can hang or lose data silently. No regression tests for complex streaming logic.

description: Array index used as React key (key={i}). React can't reconcile list items properly—causes animation bugs, state persistence issues, wrong updates on sort/filter.
impact: When users sort/filter results, list re-renders incorrectly. Use flight.id instead.

description: Calendar fetch chain missing Promise.catch(). If API fails, component silently hangs in loading state forever.
impact: Users on slow networks see frozen heatmap indefinitely. Add error boundary.

description: Missing client-side caching for calendar data. 6 API calls fire on every route change despite Redis caching server-side. Should use SWR or localStorage.
impact: 6x unnecessary API load, hits rate limits faster, slow UX.

description: Array reduce() without initial value on potentially empty arrays. If rawOutbound/rawReturn empty, reduce returns undefined, causing downstream null reference errors.
impact: Zero-result searches crash or return null prices. Add initial value guard.

description: originZone/destZone are nullable but passed to getAwardTaxes() without null checks. Silent calculation errors possible.
impact: Award tax calculations skip for some routes, prices wrong by 5-10%.

description: No runtime validation of Duffel API response shape. Missing fields silently become undefined, cascading null reference errors.
impact: Malformed API responses cause hard-to-debug crashes deep in enrichment logic.

description: AIRLINE_TO_PROGRAM mapping never updated with P5 airlines (Air India, Swiss, TAP, LOT, SAS, Asiana, EVA). Users won't get optimization recommendations for these carriers.
impact: P5 airlines silently excluded from miles optimizer suggestions.

description: No timing instrumentation on expensive compute. enrich() and buildCostOptions() lack performance metrics. Can't diagnose which enrichment step is bottleneck.
impact: Performance issues hidden from metrics. Can't optimize without blind guessing.

description: TRAVELPAYOUTS_TOKEN passed in URL query string. Token leaks via Referer header, browser history, CDN logs. Should use POST + Authorization header.
impact: Token compromise risk. Move to headers or POST body immediately.

description: 5 core public functions missing JSDoc: searchEngine(), buildCostOptions(), enrich(), SearchForm, Results. New developers can't understand signatures without reading full implementation.
impact: Slower onboarding, more typos in function calls, inconsistent API usage.

description: No coverage thresholds configured. Coverage can regress to 0% without CI detection.
impact: Test quality degrades silently. No automated enforcement of coverage minimums.

location: lib/buyMilesEngine.ts, lib/cityToIata.ts, lib/geoRoutes.ts, lib/globalAlliances.ts, lib/transferEngine.ts, lib/dataFreshness.ts
description: 6 unused library files never imported. ~500 lines of dead code.
impact: Removes maintenance burden, shrinks codebase, improves readability.

description: Rounding formula duplicated 9 times across cost calculations. Inconsistency risk if logic changes.
impact: Extract to utility function. Prevents decimal rounding bugs, future-proofs precision.

description: CONFIDENCE_PENALTY map duplicated in 2 files. Will break if not kept in sync.
impact: Search and stream endpoints diverge on confidence penalties. Extract to shared constant.

description: costEngine.ts is monolithic at 1,102 lines. Mixes program mapping, pricing, guarantees, and calculations. Hard to test, understand, maintain.
impact: Split into costCalculator, programEngine, guaranteeEngine. Improves testability and maintainability.

description: F2 (PriceHeatmap) feature completely undocumented. No docs on 6-month calendar fetch, cabin multipliers, color-coding logic.
impact: Future developers can't extend feature without reading full source.

description: F3 (Portefeuille) feature completely undocumented. No docs on portfolio balance logic, user data source, results integration.
impact: Feature isolated from team knowledge. Can't debug user issues.

description: 13 untested modules (2,000+ lines). optimizer, autoCalibrate, supplements, globalPrograms, alerts, dynamicAwardEngine, seatAlerts, milesAcquisition have zero dedicated test files.
impact: Silent bugs in optimization, supplement logic, alerting. High maintenance risk.

description: Duffel API error responses logged without sanitization. If error includes API key, it leaks to Sentry.
impact: Potential secret leakage. Filter sensitive fields before logging.

description: Duffel 429 rate limit responses don't parse Retry-After header. App silently falls back to Travelpayouts without informing user.
impact: Rate limiting transparency missing. Users don't know why results are cached.

description: ESLint disable without justification. Makes code maintenance fragile.
impact: Add comment explaining why dependency is safe to omit.

description: Missing React.memo on expensive components. Re-renders unnecessarily when parent updates.
impact: Recalculates expensive component logic on every parent re-render.

description: Missing useCallback on memoized component event handlers. New function created on every render.
impact: Wastes reconciliation work if handlers passed to memoized children.

description: Unsafe optional chaining in calendar data. If departure_at is null, creates empty string key.
impact: Could create invalid cache keys or missing data in heatmap.

description: Program guarantees hardcoded in costEngine. No data-driven approach—adding guarantee requires code modification.
impact: Extract guarantees to config file. Easier to manage and update without code changes.

description: CACHE_VERSION bump rule unclear. Rule in CLAUDE.md but not in code—developers must read two files.
impact: Add inline comment explaining when to bump version.

description: CABIN_MULTIPLIER rationale undocumented. No explanation of why premium=1.8, business=4.0, first=6.5.
impact: Add JSDoc explaining multiplier sources and assumptions.

description: README is generic create-next-app template. Should cover setup (env vars), testing, architecture overview.
impact: Improves onboarding for new developers and contributors.

description: 5 console.log statements mixed with structured logging. Should use logError/logWarn for consistency.
impact: Standardizes logging across codebase.

description: No session ID propagation across API requests. Can't trace user flow in error context for debugging.
impact: Easier error diagnosis and user support troubleshooting.

description: API providers loosely abstracted. No common provider interface—retry/fallback logic inline, tight coupling to API quirks.
impact: Adding new provider requires duplicating pattern. Extract to ProviderAdapter interface.

description: Cache schema duplicated without abstraction. CACHE_VERSION coordination required manually in 2 places.
impact: 2+ hour refactor to extract lib/cache.ts service. Prevents sync bugs.
